videos.headline: Wisconsin scores 95-yard pick-six right before halftime
videos.description: Wisconsin's Ricardo Hallman picks off the pass and goes 95 yards for a Badgers touchdown before halftime against Rutgers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wisconsin scores 95-yard pick-six right before halftime) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Braelon Allen breaks through for a Wisconsin TD
videos.description: Braelon Allen atones for an earlier fumble and gets in the end zone for an 18-yard Wisconsin touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Braelon Allen breaks through for a Wisconsin TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ian Strong scores late TD for Rutgers
videos.description: Ian Strong tallies a consolation touchdown late for Rutgers against Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ian Strong scores late TD for Rutgers) 2023/10/07 ESHEET
